nodes.label: Taiwan Tectonic/Geopolitical Shock
nodes.description: High-magnitude seismic event or kinetic blockade in the Taiwan Strait, targeting the world's primary semiconductor manufacturing hub.

nodes.label: TSMC Fab Shutdown
nodes.description: Immediate cessation of lithography operations; vibration-sensitive equipment requires weeks of recalibration.

nodes.label: Global Tech Supply Chain Breakage
nodes.description: Downstream failure of AI, automotive, and consumer electronics sectors due to zero-inventory buffer.

nodes.label: Nifty IT Sector Collapse
nodes.description: Indian IT services and hardware-dependent firms face massive revenue contraction due to client hardware shortages.

nodes.label: Strait Tension Escalation
nodes.description: Vulnerability of Taiwan's infrastructure invites aggressive posturing, increasing risk of blockade or kinetic conflict.

nodes.label: Inflationary Domino Effect
nodes.description: Supply chain breakdown triggers global inflation, spiking energy and food costs.

nodes.label: Maritime Trade Route Paralysis
nodes.description: Increased naval presence in the Taiwan Strait forces rerouting of global shipping, spiking insurance premiums.

nodes.label: Sovereign Debt Risk
nodes.description: Fiscal strain on nations heavily reliant on tech exports as GDP growth stalls.

nodes.label: Energy Market Volatility
nodes.description: Disruption in shipping lanes forces energy price spikes, compounding the inflationary crisis.

nodes.label: The Taiwan Nexus
nodes.description: The convergence point where tectonic risk, semiconductor dependency, and geopolitical power projection collide.

headline: THE SILICON CHOKEPOINT: TECTONIC AND GEOPOLITICAL CONVERGENCE IN TAIWAN TO TRIGGER GLOBAL ECONOMIC COLLAPSE.
